basic_details.job_title: Hindustan Copper HCL Executive Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 70 Posts
basic_details.job_category: Schedule-A Miniratna Category-I Central Public Sector Enterprise (CPSE)
basic_details.short_information: The latest Hindustan Copper Limited (HCL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Deputy Manager (E2), Manager (E3), and Senior Manager (E4) posts! Published on 16-05-2026 at Hindustan Copper Limited Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 70 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the minimum 18 years and above age group and possessing a relevant Bachelor’s Degree / Post Graduate Degree / CA / CMA / MBA / MBBS qualification as per post requirement can apply online from 05-06-2026 to 25-06-2026. Find all details about the HCL Executive new vacancy 2026, including eligib

important_dates.interview_date: To be notified on HCL website

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 500/- (Rupees Five Hundred only) + applicable Bank charges
application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay a non-refundable application processing fee as specified below. The fee must be paid online through the Payment Gateway / NEFT Online Transfer via HCL's website only. No other form of remittance shall be accepted. Fee paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of reckoning (01-05-2026). Only Indian Nationals aged 18 years and above are eligible to apply. Educational qualifications must be from Government / UGC / AIU / AICTE recognized institutes. Equivalent qualifications shall be considered as per Government / UGC / AIU / AICTE guidelines. | Educational Qualification (Discipline-wise) | Age Relaxation

vacancy_details.Remark: If candidate/s not available in identified category, post/s may be filled by interchanging among other identified PwBD categories.

If candidate/s not available, one post may be filled by interchanging among other identified PwBD categories. Thereafter, if no suitable PwBD candidate is available, post/s may be filled by a non-PwBD person.

selection_process: For every completed year of relevant experience beyond minimum requirement 1 Mark per year
For every additional higher qualification over the minimum essential qualification (relevant cadre/discipline only) 1 Mark each, subject to maximum 2 Marks
Tie-break: Higher company turnover gets higher rank –
Number of Vacancies (Category-wise) Number of Candidates to be Called for Personal Interview
More than 1 vacancy 5 candidates per vacancy (1:5 ratio)

The selection process consists of a single stage - Personal Interview (PI) carrying 100% weightage. Candidates will be shortlisted for PI based on experience and additional qualifications if applications exceed the zone of consideration. The final selection and merit list will be based solely on performance in the Personal Interview.
Stage 1 - Shortlisting Criteria (if applications exceed zone of consideration)
Zone of Consideration (Shortlisting Ratio for Interview)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the HCL website career section (www.hindustancopper.com). No manual/paper applications will be entertained.
The online portal opens on 05-06-2026 (11:00 AM) and closes on 25-06-2026 (Till Midnight).

Candidates must register on the HCL website under the career section before filling the application. Candidates are advised to read the "How to fill the Online Application form" instructions on the website before applying.
Documents to be Submitted / Verified at the time of Personal Interview:
Date of Birth proof – Xth Standard Passing Certificate or School Leaving Certificate / Birth Certificate
Mark Sheets and Degree/Diploma Certificates of Graduate and/or Post-Graduate and/or Professional Qualification as applicable
Experience Certificates for each organization (with designation, department, date of joining/leaving, job description)
If working in PSU/Govt.: documentary evidence of working in next below grade and scale of pay
No Objection Certificate (NOC) from present employer if working in PSU / Government organization
Salary Slips (last 3 months), Bank Statement, and latest Form-16 (for private/bank employees)
Caste/Category Certificate – SC/ST/OBC (NCL)/EWS/PwBD as applicable, in prescribed Government of India format
Original Photo ID proof (Aadhar / Driving License / Voter-ID)
CGPA to Percentage conversion certificate (if grades awarded) duly issued by University/Institute
Documents to be produced at the venue of Personal Interview as per call letter. Non-production of original documents will debar candidates from appearing in the interview.
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals of 18 years and above are eligible to apply. Date of reckoning for age, experience, and qualification is 01-05-2026. Experience acquired in Training / Consultancy / Teaching / Fellowship / Internship / Apprenticeship / Academic Project shall not be counted. Experience in relevant field only shall be considered; HCL's decision on relevance is final. Candidates from private organizations must be from companies with turnover of Rs. 250 Crores or more. Selected candidates must execute a Service Agreement Bond of Rs. 3 Lakhs and serve a minimum of 3 years. Government / CPSE employees must route their application through proper channel or submit NOC at the time of interview. OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates must submit OBC-NCL certificate issued on or after 01-04-2026. EWS candidates must submit EWS certificate valid for the year 2026-27. Category once filled/declared in the online application will not be changed. All amendments/corrigendum will be communicated only through the HCL website - candidates should visit regularly. Exact percentage of marks should be mentioned; rounding off of marks should not be done. Email ID and mobile number provided in the application must remain active till recruitment is complete. Canvassing directly or indirectly shall disqualify the candidature. Legal jurisdiction for any dispute arising out of this recruitment shall be Kolkata only. HCL is an Equal Opportunity Employer and encourages workplace diversity.

faq.question: Q1. What is Hindustan Copper Limited Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Hindustan Copper Limited (HCL), a Schedule-A Miniratna Category-I CPSE under the Ministry of Mines, has released Advertisement No. Estt./1/2033/2025-26 dated 16/05/2026 for recruitment of 70 Executives in Grades E2, E3, and E4 across multiple disciplines.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced under HCL Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 70 Executive vacancies have been announced, including posts of Deputy Manager (E2), Manager (E3), and Senior Manager (E4) in 15 different disciplines, out of which 5 posts are reserved for PwBD candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for HCL Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application portal will open on 05-06-2026 from 11:00 AM and will remain active till 25-06-2026 (midnight), while the advertisement was released on 16-05-2026 and the date of reckoning for age, qualification, and experience is 01-05-2026.

faq.question: Q4. Which posts and grades are available in HCL Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Executive posts of Deputy Manager in Grade E2, Manager in Grade E3, and Senior Manager in Grade E4 in disciplines such as Mining, Geology, Environment Management, Safety & Fire, Electrical, Mechanical, Civil, HR, Finance, Materials & Contracts, Medical & Health Services, and others.

faq.question: Q5. What is the pay scale for HCL Executive posts?
faq.answer: The pay scales are as per IDA pattern: E2 – Rs. 50000–160000/-, E3 – Rs. 60000–180000/-, and E4 – Rs. 70000–200000/-, with corresponding CTC ranging approximately from about 16–18 lakhs at entry level to above 50–60 lakhs at the maximum level depending on mining/non-mining category and grade.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for HCL Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General, OBC, and EWS candidates must pay a non-refundable application fee of Rs. 500/- plus applicable bank charges, whereas SC, ST, PwBD, and internal HCL candidates are exempted from payment of the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for HCL Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection is based on a Personal Interview (PI) carrying 100% weightage, with candidates shortlisted for interview based on relevant post-qualification experience and additional higher qualifications if applications exceed the prescribed zone of consideration.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age and nationality eligibility for HCL Executive posts?
faq.answer: Only Indian Nationals who are at least 18 years of age as on 01-05-2026 are eligible to apply, and upper age limits are relaxable as per Government norms for SC, ST, OBC (NCL), PwBD, and Ex-Servicemen candidates.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply online for HCL Executive Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates must apply online only through the Career section of the official HCL website https://www.hindustancopper.com between 05-06-2026 and 25-06-2026, and no offline or any other mode of application will be accepted.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any service bond for selected HCL Executive candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, selected candidates are required to execute a Service Agreement Bond of Rs. 3 lakhs, committing to serve Hindustan Copper Limited for a minimum period of three years from the date of joining.
